title: Selling Beats Online with Crypto Payments Explained for Digital Creators — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Are you a musician in Nigeria who can't sell beats online with PayPal? Maybe you're in the Philippines and can't use Stripe due to banking restrictions. Unchained Commerce has a solution for digital creators in restricted countries and platforms who want to sell their music, ebooks, courses, and other digital products without the hassle of traditional payment processors. In this post, we'll explain how to sell beats online with crypto payments, and why this technology matters for creators getting paid.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling beats online with crypto payments is a game-changer for music producers who can't use traditional payment processors due to geographic restrictions or banking limitations. By using crypto payments, you can sell your beats to buyers worldwide without the need for PayPal, Stripe, or other traditional payment processors. This means you can get paid in your preferred cryptocurrency, and not have to worry about exchange rate fees or conversion costs. It's a more open and accessible way for creators to monetize their digital products.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The technology behind selling beats online with crypto payments uses a combination of blockchain-based payment processors and frontend wallet integrations. For example, Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) allows buyers to pay in multiple cryptocurrencies, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDT, and over 300 other coins. This means that music producers can set their own prices in USD, and get instant conversions to cryptocurrency at the time of sale. The payment processor, NOWPayments, handles the transaction securely and automatically, without the need for buyer accounts or KYC checks.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This solution is designed for music producers, artists, and digital creators who want to sell their products online without the hassle of traditional payment processors. It's perfect for those who are restricted from using PayPal, Stripe, or other platforms due to geographic or banking limitations. With Unchained Commerce's solution, creators can focus on making music, creating ebooks, and producing digital products, without worrying about the complexities of payment processing.
Selling beats online with crypto payments can help music producers get paid in their preferred cryptocurrency, without the need for traditional payment processors.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The key components that make Unchained Commerce's solution work together include the Core Shop Engine, which handles automated delivery and payment verification, and the Admin Dashboard, which provides real-time analytics and transaction logs. The Web3 Wallet Connect frontend allows buyers to interact with the shop and make payments in multiple cryptocurrencies. The NOWPayments payment processor handles the transaction securely and automatically, without the need for buyer accounts or KYC checks.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To start selling beats online with crypto payments, first sign up for an account on the Unchained Commerce website. Then, install the Core Shop Engine and Web3 Wallet Connect frontend on your website. Configure the payment settings to accept multiple cryptocurrencies, and set your prices in USD. Finally, promote your shop to potential buyers and start selling your beats. With Unchained Commerce's solution, you can get started with selling beats online with crypto payments in just a few easy steps.
